intent: Sweep fixture (compact floor, near-square ratio 1.15) for 1s_1br_sq_side_split_bath_gr -- 9.77x8.5 m lot, 25.96 m2 buildable floor. Deliberately restricted to compact sizes only (2026-07-20) -- see the ratio-1.00 compact fixture's note for why; larger sizes (formerly r115_max at 12.07x10.5) are dropped, not superseded by an equivalent LD near-square variant yet.
